onboard: Onboard 2-key transponder add: insert Key A, turn ON (3–6 sec), turn OFF and remove; within 10 sec insert Key B, turn ON (3–6 sec), turn OFF and remove; within 10 sec insert new unprogrammed key, turn ON 6+ sec — security light glows 3 sec then off = success. RKE remote only (no transponder): cycle ignition OFF→RUN 8 times in 10 sec ending in RUN; door locks cycle to confirm; within 8 sec press any button on fob; locks cycle per fob to confirm.
addKey: With 1 working key only: connect FORScan (ELM327/OBDLink, extended license) or Autel/Snap-on via OBD under driver dash. Navigate to PCM PATS > Ignition Key Code Program. Tool either gives timed access (wait ~10 min) or coded access (incode/outcode exchange). Insert new key when prompted and follow on-screen cycle. Must program minimum 2 keys total.
allKeysLost: Connect IDS/FDRS, Autel IM608 Pro, or Snap-on Zeus via OBD. Navigate to PATS > Erase All Keys; obtain incode from FORScan calculator / patscode.com / Ford ETIS for coded-access vehicles, or wait ~10 min timed access. After erase, program minimum 2 new keys sequentially. For FORScan: vehicle supports this on ~1997–2011 MY per FORScan documentation.
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column, above pedals
securityWait: ~10 min PATS timed access (coded-access vehicles: incode/outcode instead)
specialTool: FORScan + OBDLink EX, or Autel IM608 / Snap-on Zeus / IDS

onboard: Onboard 2-key transponder add: insert Key A, turn ON (3–6 sec), turn OFF and remove; within 10 sec insert Key B, turn ON (3–6 sec), turn OFF and remove; within 10 sec insert new unprogrammed key, turn ON 6+ sec — security light 3 sec then off = success. RKE remote only: cycle ignition OFF→RUN 8x in 10 sec ending in RUN; press fob button within 8 sec per fob.
addKey: With 1 working key: connect FORScan or Autel/Snap-on via OBD (under driver dash). Navigate PATS > Key Code Program. Timed (~10 min) or coded (incode/outcode) access depending on vehicle. Program minimum 2 keys total.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS, Autel IM608 Pro, or Snap-on Zeus via OBD. Erase all keys, obtain incode (patscode.com or built-in calculator) or wait timed access (~10 min). Program minimum 2 new 4D63 80-bit keys.
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column, above pedals
securityWait: ~10 min PATS timed or incode/outcode coded access
specialTool: FORScan + OBDLink EX, or Autel IM608 / Snap-on Zeus / IDS

onboard: Intelligent Access (push-button start) backup-slot method requires 2 already-programmed working fobs. Place Fob 1 in center-console cup holder backup slot (under rubber mat), press START/STOP once (acc position, do not start), wait 5 sec, press START/STOP again (off), remove Fob 1 within 10 sec. Insert Fob 2, press START/STOP, wait 5 sec, press START/STOP, remove. Insert new unprogrammed fob, press START/STOP — hazard lights flash or cluster shows 'Key Programmed'. Max 4 fobs. Transponder/flip key trim: no onboard method; professional tool required.
addKey: With 2 working fobs and new fob: use backup-slot onboard method above. With only 1 working fob: requires IDS/FDRS or Snap-on Zeus via OBD; timed access (~10 min) via NASTF-registered tool. Note: Autel IM508/IM608 lost Ford 2015+ support per Diagnostic Network report.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS (NASTF credential required) or Snap-on Zeus / AutoProPAD G2 via OBD. Timed access (~10 min wait enforced by cloud authentication). After parameter reset, program minimum 2 new ID49 fobs. Autel IM608 no longer supports 2015+ Ford per industry reports.
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column
securityWait: ~10 min timed access (NASTF/cloud enforced on 2015+ AKL)
specialTool: IDS/FDRS (NASTF) or Snap-on Zeus / AutoProPAD G2

onboard: With 2 working fobs: backup-slot method — place Fob 1 in center-console backup slot (under rubber mat), press START/STOP (acc, no start), wait 5 sec, press START/STOP (off), remove; within 10 sec insert Fob 2, press START/STOP, wait 5 sec, press START/STOP, remove; insert new fob, press START/STOP — cluster shows 'Key Programmed'. Max 4 fobs.
addKey: With 2 working fobs: use backup-slot method above. With 1 fob only: IDS/FDRS or Snap-on Zeus via OBD, timed access (~10 min), NASTF credential. Autel IM508S can perform PCM Parameter Reset and key add on F-150 2018+ via IMMO > Ford > F-150 > Smart Key > Parameter Reset menu per Autel blog.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS or Autel IM508S/IM608 Pro or Snap-on Zeus via OBD. PCM Parameter Reset first (IMMO > Ford > F-150 > Smart Key > Control Unit > Parameter Reset), then program minimum 2 new ID49 fobs. Timed access ~10 min. NASTF credential may be required for IDS/FDRS path.
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column
securityWait: ~10 min timed access
specialTool: IDS/FDRS, Autel IM508S/IM608 Pro, or Snap-on Zeus

onboard: With 2 working fobs: backup-slot method — place Fob 1 in center-console backup slot, press START/STOP (acc), wait 5 sec, press START/STOP (off), remove; within 10 sec insert Fob 2, repeat; insert new fob, press START/STOP — cluster confirms. Max 4 fobs.
addKey: With 2 working fobs: backup-slot onboard method. With 1 fob or fewer: IDS/FDRS (NASTF required) or Snap-on Zeus / Autel IM608 Pro via OBD, timed access ~10 min.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS (NASTF credential required) or Snap-on Zeus / Autel IM608 Pro via OBD. Mandatory ~10 min timed security wait enforced by cloud/FDRS. Parameter reset then program minimum 2 new ID49 fobs. Cannot be done DIY — NASTF-registered locksmith or Ford dealer required.
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column
securityWait: ~10 min timed access (cloud-enforced)
specialTool: IDS/FDRS (NASTF), Autel IM608 Pro, or Snap-on Zeus

onboard: Onboard 2-key transponder add: insert Key A, turn ON (3–6 sec), turn OFF and remove; within 10 sec insert Key B, turn ON, turn OFF and remove; within 10 sec insert new unprogrammed key, turn ON 6+ sec — security light 3 sec then off = success. RKE remote: cycle ignition OFF→RUN 8x in 10 sec ending in RUN; press fob button within 8 sec.
addKey: With 1 working key: FORScan or Autel/Snap-on via OBD (under driver dash). PATS > Key Code Program; timed (~10 min) or coded (incode/outcode) access.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS, Autel IM608, or Snap-on Zeus via OBD. Erase all keys, incode/outcode or ~10 min timed access. Program minimum 2 new 4D63 80-bit keys.
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column
securityWait: ~10 min PATS timed or incode/outcode coded access
specialTool: FORScan + OBDLink EX, or Autel IM608 / IDS

onboard: Onboard 2-key transponder add: same sequence as 2004–2010 row. Insert Key A ON (3–6 sec) OFF remove; within 10 sec Key B ON OFF remove; within 10 sec new key ON 6+ sec — security light 3 sec off = success. RKE: OFF→RUN 8x ending RUN, press fob button within 8 sec.
addKey: With 1 working key: FORScan or Autel/Snap-on via OBD. Navigate PATS > Key Code Program; timed or coded access.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS, Autel IM608, or Snap-on Zeus via OBD. Erase all keys, obtain incode or wait ~10 min timed access. Program minimum 2 new 4D63 80-bit keys.
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column
securityWait: ~10 min PATS timed or incode/outcode coded access
specialTool: FORScan + OBDLink EX, or Autel IM608 / IDS

onboard: With 2 working fobs (smart key trims): backup-slot method in center-console storage area. Place Fob 1 in backup slot, press START/STOP (acc), wait 5 sec, press START/STOP (off), remove; within 10 sec Fob 2 same sequence; insert new fob, press START/STOP — cluster confirms. Flip key trim: no onboard method.
addKey: With 2 working fobs: backup-slot onboard. With 1 fob: IDS/FDRS or Snap-on Zeus / Autel IM608 Pro via OBD, timed access ~10 min.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS (NASTF credential required) or Snap-on Zeus / Autel IM608 Pro via OBD. PCM Parameter Reset + ~10 min timed wait. Program minimum 2 new ID49 fobs. Same platform as F-150 2017+ — same AKL requirements.
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column
securityWait: ~10 min timed access
specialTool: IDS/FDRS (NASTF), Autel IM608 Pro, or Snap-on Zeus

Requires 2 existing programmed fobs. Flip key trim: professional tool required.

allKeysLost: Remote head key: FORScan + incode/outcode or timed access via OBD. Smart key (ID49): IDS/FDRS (NASTF recommended) or Snap-on Zeus via OBD, ~10 min timed, PCM Parameter Reset. Program minimum 2 keys. Autel IM508/IM608 may not support 2015+ ID49 AKL per industry reports.
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column
securityWait: ~10 min timed (ID49 path) or incode/outcode coded (4D63 path)
specialTool: FORScan / IDS for 4D63 trim; IDS/FDRS or Snap-on Zeus for ID49 smart key

addKey: With 2 working fobs: backup-slot method in center-console armrest storage slot. Place Fob 1 in slot, press START/STOP (acc, no start), wait 5 sec, press START/STOP (off), remove; within 10 sec Fob 2 same sequence; insert new fob, press START/STOP — cluster confirms.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS (NASTF credential recommended) or Snap-on Zeus / Autel IM608 Pro via OBD. PCM Parameter Reset + ~10 min timed wait. Program minimum 2 new ID49 fobs.
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column
securityWait: ~10 min timed access
specialTool: IDS/FDRS (NASTF), Snap-on Zeus, or Autel IM608 Pro

onboard: Onboard 2-key transponder add: insert Key A ON (3–6 sec) OFF remove; within 10 sec Key B ON OFF remove; within 10 sec new key ON 6+ sec — security light 3 sec off = success. RKE remote: OFF→RUN 8x ending RUN; press fob button within 8 sec.
addKey: With 1 working key: FORScan or Autel/Snap-on via OBD. PATS > Key Code Program; timed (~10 min) or coded (incode/outcode) access.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS, FORScan extended license, or Autel/Snap-on via OBD. Erase keys, incode/outcode or ~10 min timed. Program minimum 2 new 4D63 80-bit keys.
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column
securityWait: ~10 min PATS timed or incode/outcode coded access
specialTool: FORScan + OBDLink EX, or Autel IM608 / IDS

onboard: Onboard 2-key transponder add: insert Key A ON (3–6 sec) OFF remove; within 10 sec Key B ON OFF remove; within 10 sec new key ON 6+ sec — security light 3 sec off = success. RKE: OFF→RUN 8x ending RUN; press fob button within 8 sec.

allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS, FORScan extended license, or Autel/Snap-on via OBD. Erase keys, incode/outcode or ~10 min timed. Program minimum 2 new 4D63 80-bit keys.

onboard: Smart key (Titanium/push-button): backup-slot method requires 2 working fobs — place Fob 1 in center-console cup-holder backup slot (key ring at top, buttons toward rear), press START/STOP (acc, no start), wait 5 sec, press START/STOP (off), remove; within 10 sec Fob 2 same; insert new fob, press START/STOP; must complete within 30 sec. Transponder keyed-ignition trim: professional tool required.
addKey: Smart key with 1 fob only: IDS/FDRS or Snap-on Zeus via OBD, timed access ~10 min. Transponder trim with 1 key: IDS/FDRS or Snap-on / Autel via OBD.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS (NASTF recommended) or Snap-on Zeus via OBD. PCM Parameter Reset + ~10 min timed wait. Program minimum 2 new ID49 fobs/transponders. Autel IM508/IM608 may not support 2015+ AKL.
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column
securityWait: ~10 min timed access
specialTool: IDS/FDRS (NASTF) or Snap-on Zeus / Autel IM608 Pro

onboard: With 2 working fobs: backup-slot method — place Fob 1 in center-console cup-holder backup slot (key ring top, buttons toward rear), press START/STOP (acc, no start), wait 5 sec, press START/STOP (off), remove; within 10 sec Fob 2 same; insert new fob, press START/STOP. Complete within 30 sec. Max 4 fobs.
addKey: With 2 working fobs: backup-slot onboard method. With 1 fob: IDS/FDRS or Snap-on Zeus via OBD, timed access ~10 min.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS (NASTF credential recommended) or Snap-on Zeus / Autel IM608 Pro via OBD. PCM Parameter Reset + ~10 min timed wait. Program minimum 2 new ID49 fobs.

onboard: With 2 working fobs: backup-slot method in cup-holder slot — Fob 1 in slot (key ring top, buttons rear), press START/STOP (acc), wait 5 sec, press START/STOP (off), remove; within 10 sec Fob 2 same; insert new fob, press START/STOP.
addKey: With 2 working fobs: backup-slot onboard. With 1 fob: IDS/FDRS (NASTF) or Snap-on Zeus via OBD, timed ~10 min.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS (NASTF credential required) or Snap-on Zeus / Autel IM608 Pro via OBD. PCM Parameter Reset + ~10 min timed wait. Program minimum 2 new ID49 fobs (S650 uses FCC M3N-A3C054339).
obdPort: Under driver dash, left of steering column
securityWait: ~10 min timed access
specialTool: IDS/FDRS (NASTF), Snap-on Zeus, or Autel IM608 Pro

onboard: Some configurations onboard-capable (remote head key, 4D63/DST80 trims): insert Key A ON (3–6 sec) OFF remove; within 10 sec Key B ON OFF remove; within 10 sec new key ON 6+ sec — security light 3 sec off = success. Verify vehicle has PATS ring around ignition cylinder before attempting. Non-PATS Transit (some commercial spec) has no transponder requirement.
addKey: With 1 working key: IDS/FDRS or FORScan via OBD (under driver dash). PATS > Key Code Program; timed or coded access. WSM references Section 419-01B for PATS Transits.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS or Autel IM608 / Snap-on Zeus via OBD. Erase keys, incode/outcode or ~10 min timed access. Program minimum 2 new 4D63 80-bit remote head keys. Confirm vehicle has PATS via OASIS 'IMMOBILIZER' search.
obdPort: Under driver dash, driver side (location typical for Ford vans)
securityWait: ~10 min PATS timed or incode/outcode coded access
specialTool: IDS/FDRS recommended; FORScan + OBDLink EX as alternative

addKey: Professional tool required. Connect IDS/FDRS or Autel IM608 via OBD (under driver dash). Navigate PATS/IMMO > Add Key. Timed access ~10 min. Flip key (N5F-A08TAA) and transponder (H128-PT) both require tool programming — no onboard DIY path for ID49.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS or Autel IM608 Pro / Snap-on Zeus via OBD. PCM Parameter Reset + ~10 min timed wait. Program minimum 2 new ID49 fobs/keys. Commercial Transit may have dealer-only restriction; confirm NASTF credential.
obdPort: Under driver dash, driver side
securityWait: ~10 min timed access
specialTool: IDS/FDRS, Autel IM608 Pro, or Snap-on Zeus

addKey: Requires IDS/FDRS or FORScan with extended license via OBD (under driver dash). Tibbe blade (FO21T) must be cut on Tibbe-capable cutter. Navigate PATS > Key Code Program; timed (~10 min) or coded (incode/outcode) access. Some Transit Connects of this era are non-PATS (no transponder ring around ignition); verify first.
allKeysLost: IDS/FDRS or FORScan + OBDLink extended license via OBD. Erase keys, incode/outcode or ~10 min timed access. Program minimum 2 new 4D63 80-bit keys. Tibbe blade requires specialized cutting machine.
obdPort: Under driver dash, driver side
securityWait: ~10 min PATS timed or incode/outcode coded access
specialTool: IDS/FDRS or FORScan + OBDLink EX; Tibbe key cutter required

addKey: With 1 working key: IDS/FDRS or FORScan via OBD. PATS > Key Code Program; timed (~10 min) or coded (incode/outcode) access.

securityWait: ~10 min PATS timed or incode/outcode coded access
